categories.MODEL_ERROR: AI model hallucination, refusal, or invalid format.
categories.SCRIPT_ERROR: Bugs in the RTL, testbench, or automation scripts.

errors.description: Simulation exceeded the maximum allowed time.
errors.suggested_action: Check for infinite loops in testbench or increase timeout value in Makefile/config.

errors.pattern: Error: syntax error|Error: module .* not found|verilator: Bad option
errors.suggested_action: Check syntax, missing includes, or file paths in filelist.f.
Review the waveform around the assertion timestamp. Check reset logic or signal stability.
Check python dependencies, PYTHONPATH, or script syntax.
Verify input paths and upstream stage artifact generation.

errors.pattern: I cannot fulfill this request|I'm sorry, but I can't|content_filter_detected
errors.suggested_action: Refine the prompt to be more specific or check safety settings.

errors.description: Model output invalid JSON or format.
errors.suggested_action: Check if model output is truncated or mixed with markdown.
